title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, a CS professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI fundamentals by hand at human speed, grounded in mathematical foundations rather than latest tools, builds durable skills that survive hype cycles. He critiques the "AI-native" mindset while advocating that people can shape AI development rather than vice versa.
